# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 52. Tex. Deepwater Port Procedures Act
##### § 52.012 — Effect on Other Laws

This chapter does not affect the power or activities of a state or local agency and does not change or repeal the statutes regarding those agencies.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: This chapter does not affect the power or activities of a state or local agency and does not change or repeal the statutes regarding those agencies.
